# Al-Rahma Academy

> Al-Rahma Academy teaches the Holy Quran, Arabic and Islamic studies online through one-to-one live lessons with certified Al-Azhar tutors, for children and adults across Europe and worldwide. Two free trial classes, flexible scheduling, female tutors available.

## Main pages
- [Home](https://al-rahmaacademy.com/): Overview of courses, pricing and the free trial.
- [About](https://al-rahmaacademy.com/about): Mission, vision and values of the academy.
- [Teachers](https://al-rahmaacademy.com/teachers): Certified Al-Azhar tutors and their specialties.
- [FAQ](https://al-rahmaacademy.com/faq): Answers about lessons, pricing, trials and certificates.
- [Free Trial / Enrollment](https://al-rahmaacademy.com/enroll): Book two free trial classes.

## Courses
- [Ijazah Certification](https://al-rahmaacademy.com/course/ijazah): Quran memorization and recitation with a connected chain (sanad).
- [Islamic Studies](https://al-rahmaacademy.com/course/islamic-studies): Fiqh, Aqeedah, Seerah and Arabic.
- [Blog](https://al-rahmaacademy.com/blog): Articles on Quran learning, Tajweed and Arabic.
